name: cuber luber i have a tumor

reviews.review_description: It is very funny and i play it with many of my friends! Can't wait to see what's up coming!

developer_response.body:
thanks a lot! we appreciate your kindness, and we continue to push updates out for dedicated players like yours.

- thanks a lot, cuber luber dev team <3
